---
title: "Page not found"
toc: false
---

The page you were looking for isn't here — it may have moved, been renamed, or the link may be wrong.

## Where you can go instead

- **[Home](index.qmd)** — overview of every topic
- **[Getting Started](getting-started.qmd)** — JASP setup and data preparation
- **[Which test should I use?](which-test.qmd)** — decision tree
- **[Reporting & effect sizes](reporting.qmd)** — APA reporting and effect-size conventions

Or jump to a specific topic via the navigation bar at the top.

## Spotted a broken link?

If you arrived here by clicking a link on this site, please flag it on the [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/JohnnyDoorn/paddling-pool/issues) so it can be fixed.
